completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith, 1 part, React/TypeScript/Vite SPA (project_type_id: web)
Tech stack: React 18, TypeScript 5, Vite 5, Tailwind CSS 3, shadcn/ui, dnd-kit, Framer Motion, Vitest, Playwright
UI: 49 shadcn/ui primitives + 7 feature components. State: Context/Reducer. No API. No data models (localStorage only).

Dev commands, env vars, Vitest + Playwright test setup, key patterns — written to development-guide.md
Full architecture doc: component hierarchy, state management, data models, DnD, timer, i18n, design system, deployment — written to architecture.md
Generated: project-overview.md, component-inventory.md. source-tree-analysis.md and development-guide.md already written.
Master index generated with all links valid, no incomplete markers — written to index.md
Validation complete: 6 files generated, all links valid, no incomplete markers detected
